description: Newell Brands Inc. reported financial results for the third quarter ended September 30 2024
Newell Brands Inc. entered an underwriting agreement for $750 million 6.375% notes and $500 million 6.625% notes to redeem debt.
Newell Brands Inc. closed the sale of $1.25 billion in senior notes and entered supplemental indentures with U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association.
Newell Brands Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31 2024
Newell Brands Inc. approved the 2025 Long-Term Incentive Plan and bonus program for named executive officers, including CEO Christopher Peterson.
Co-President Doug Robinson will retire effective January 31 2025 and serve as an advisor through October 31 2025.
Workday appointed Robert Enslin as President and Chief Commercial Officer and Sayan Chakraborty as President of Product and Technology effective December 2 2024
Workday Inc. announced financial results for its fiscal third quarter ended October 31 2024
Workday Inc. appointed Elizabeth Centoni to its Board of Directors and granted her $750,000 in restricted stock units.
Workday announced a restructuring plan to eliminate approximately 1,750 positions and expects to incur $230 million to $270 million in total charges.
Workday appointed Gerrit Kazmaier as President of Product and Technology and announced the retirement of Sayan Chakraborty effective March 10 2025.
Workday Inc. announced financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ended January 31 2025
CenterPoint Energy reported financial results for the third quarter ended September 30 2024
CenterPoint Energy, Inc. entered an underwriting agreement for $500 million of 6.700% Junior Subordinated Notes due 2055.","BofA Securities, Inc., Citigroup Global Markets Inc.
CenterPoint Energy Houston Electric withdrew its appeal regarding its general rate case and plans to pursue settlement talks with intervenors.
Barry T. Smitherman notified CenterPoint Energy of his resignation from the Board of Directors effective December 31 2024
CenterPoint Energy appointed Dean Seavers to the Board of Directors and announced the retirement of EVP Lynne Harkel-Rumford effective February 3 2025
CenterPoint Energy and its subsidiaries entered agreements to extend the maturity dates of their credit facilities from 2027 to 2028.
CenterPoint Energy reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31 2024
CenterPoint Energy furnished audited financial statements and operational data for its subsidiary, Southern Indiana Gas and Electric Company, for 2023 and 2024.
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. reported financial results for the third quarter ended September 30 2024
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. reported financial results for the third quarter ended September 30 2024
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per common share for the fourth quarter of 2024
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31 2024
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. reported preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31 2024
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. announced it will hold its 36th Annual Meeting of Stockholders virtually on May 7 2025
Great Southern Bancorp Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per common share for the first quarter of 2025.
William H. Lenehan notified Macy's of his resignation from the Board of Directors effective October 25 2024
Macy's Inc. issued a press release providing preliminary sales and other financial results for the 13 weeks ended November 2 2024
Ashley Buchanan resigned as a director of Macy's Inc. effective November 25 2024

Macy's Inc. reported third quarter 2024 financial results and disclosed an internal investigation into $151 million of hidden delivery expenses from 2021 to 2024 resulting in a material weakness in internal control.
Macy's Inc. elected Robert Chavez to its Board of Directors effective April 1 2025 and announced that Sara Levinson will retire at the 2025 Annual Meeting
Macy's Inc. scheduled its annual meeting of stockholders for May 16 2025 and set the record date as March 20 2025
Macy's Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended February 1 2025
Murphy USA Inc. announced a dividend declaration which included a rate increase from the previous quarter.
Murphy USA Inc. announced financial results for the three and nine months ended September 30 2024
Murphy USA Inc. announced financial results for the three and twelve months ended December 31 2024
Murphy USA Inc. announced a dividend declaration which included a rate increase from the previous quarter.
Murphy USA Inc. representatives presented at the Raymond James 2025 Institutional Investors Conference.
